ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Your Account Activity
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have detected a transaction of INR 12,500 on your savings account (Account No: ****1234) on 07 Apr 2026 at 10:35 AM. The transaction was made at "Reliance Digital" on 07 Apr 2026.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact your bank immediately at the customer care number 1800-123-456 or visit a branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to inform you that a refund of INR 2,50,000 has been processed to your bank account (Account No: ****5678) under Income Tax Department, FY 2025-26. To confirm the refund details, please log in to your tax account by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please note that if the refund is not verified within 48 hours, the refund amount will be forfeited and the tax authorities may initiate further action.

Kindly provide your PAN and DOB for verification.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
